description.value: Aura moderate abjuration; CL 12th; Slot none; Price: 10,000 gp; Weight â. DESCRIPTION This stone grants you a +1 resistance bonus on saving throws. The bonuses from multiple amber spindles stack (up to a maximum of a +5 resistance bonus to saving throws). Cracked: This stone grants a +1 resistance bonus on Fortitude, Reflex, or Will saves. The bonuses from multiple amber spindles (cracked or otherwise) stack, up to a maximum of a +5 resistance bonus. Price: 3,400 gp. Flawed: This stone grants a +1 resistance bonus on saving throws per stone, stacking up to +3 total with other amber spindle ioun stones (flawed or otherwise). Price: 6,000 gp. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, resistance; Special creator must be 12th level; Cost 5,000 gp
